elasticmapreduce.instancegroupconfig.aut: `AutoScalingPolicy` defines how an instance group dynamically adds and terminates EC2 instances in response to the value of a CloudWatch metric. For more information, see [Using Automatic Scaling in Amazon EMR](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/emr/latest/ManagementGuide/emr-automatic-scaling.html) in the *Amazon EMR Management Guide*.

elasticmapreduce.instancegroupconfig.aut.Description: The upper and lower EC2 instance limits for an automatic scaling policy. Automatic scaling activity will not cause an instance group to grow above or below these limits.
The scale-in and scale-out rules that comprise the automatic scaling policy.
